summary: A counterterrorism and counterintelligence analytical arc, not a collection of detached topic pages.
final_use_case: It demonstrates sequence reasoning: the value is in showing how CT/CI judgments develop across phases of capability, recruitment, concealment, and disruption rather than presenting isolated topic summaries.

instruments.instrument_name: Counter-Terror Analysis — 13-page counter-terror analytical narrative arc Core Instrument Panel
instruments.input: tool buttons, rooms, workflow steps, analytical controls, and review surfaces
